title: Find My Device - Warning dialog for Play button
scenario: Verify the warning dialog for the Play button on the Find My Device screen matches the Figma design when a connected headset is selected and the Play button is clicked.
steps: 1. Open the Find My Device screen.
2. Ensure a connected headset is selected.
4. Observe the warning dialog that appears.
expected: The warning dialog matches the Figma design.
